description: 14 patch versions behind. Rust crate, will need new sha256 and vendorHash.

comments.text: Blocked: v0.1.28 Cargo.toml has [patch] overrides pointing to ../frankensqlite (a sibling repo with ~18 fsqlite-* crates). buildRustPackage can't resolve these path deps from a single source tarball. Options: (1) wait for upstream to publish fsqlite crates to crates.io, (2) write a new builder variant that fetches both repos, (3) patch Cargo.toml to use crates.io versions. Leaving at 0.1.14 for now.

title: Bump beads-rust 0.1.14 → 0.1.28
